items.name: Tomodachi-Life-Living-the-Dream-PC-Version
items.description: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream PC Version is an optimized Windows port of the popular life simulation game. Create unique Miis, develop relationships, host concerts and events on your own island in high resolution. Features improved performance, widescreen support, smooth FPS, and comfortable controls.

items.name: MOUSE-P.I.-For-Hire-Release-Game-Desktop-Version
items.description: MOUSE PI For Hire is a fun hand-drawn point-and-click detective adventure game for PC. Play as a clever mouse private investigator solving funny and challenging cases in a colorful cartoon world. Optimized desktop release with widescreen support, smooth controls, and high-resolution graphics.

items.name: Lossless-Scaling-Smoother-Gaming
items.description: Lossless Scaling is a powerful Windows tool for perfect upscaling and frame generation. Enjoy crisp integer scaling, AI-powered LSFG that can double or triple your FPS, and support for all major graphics APIs. Ideal for retro games, emulators, and modern titles. Get sharper visuals and smoother gameplay on any monitor.

items.name: FL-Production-25.2.5
items.description: FL Production 25.2.5 Producer Edition is the version of the popular DAW for music production. Includes all plugins, improved workflow, VST3 support, and high performance. Perfect for beatmakers, producers, and composers. Works great on Windows 10/11 with low latency and a modern interface.

items.description: A fish logistics web system is a digital platform designed to manage the entire supply chain of fish, from the point it is caught to its final delivery to customers.
